items.name_en: Reproduction M12317 This Nano Bucket features the brand's new Monogram Mini pattern from the 2024 Fall/Winter collection, creating the latest version of the classic Monogram canvas. The design is accented with gold metal hardware, featuring an internal pocket and a detachable leather key charm, along with double top handles and an adjustable shoulder strap for multiple carrying options. 13 x 17 x 9 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: HANDBAG EAST WEST Bowling Bag【M13084】White Multicolor (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
HANDBAG EAST WEST Bowling Bag【M13084】White Multicolor (Takashi Murakami)
This Handbag East West Sj bag is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami Re-edition series, depicting the full Monogram pattern with the artist's signature rainbow tones. The horizontal silhouette features fluid lines, top handles, nail-studded side straps, a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, and LV xTM key pouch, all accented with calfskin details. The refined corners pay homage to the brand's traditional trunks.
Size: 27 x 14 x 10 cm

items.name_en: SIDE TRUNK Medium Handbag【M14046】White Multicolor (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
SIDE TRUNK Medium Handbag【M14046】White Multicolor (Takashi Murakami)
This Side Trunk Sj medium handbag captures the playful spirit of the Murakami edition series with a whimsical Monogram pattern, incorporating reinforced metal corners and the iconic S-lock clasp into soft calfskin. It easily accommodates daily essentials. The square silhouette pays homage to the brand's classic trunks, with a detachable nail-studded handle and shoulder strap for flexible carrying.
Size: 23.5 x 16 x 8.5 cm.

Crafted from classic Monogram Hl canvas, the Nano Speedy handbag exudes ultimate femininity and is an ideal choice for carrying daily items. items.name_en: 【Nano Diane Bag】M14194 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
【Nano Diane Bag】M14194 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
The Nano Diane in two-tone Monogram Empreinte HlLt leather is a miniature version of the iconic Diane bag. This meticulously crafted piece features all the key details of the original design, including a round flap, piped edges, and a strap-style magnetic closure. Its detachable handle and detachable adjustable shoulder strap offer different carrying options.
Size: 19 x 10.5 x 6 cm

The Monogram coated canvas renders the whimsical tones of Takashi Murakami, while the Toron handle, base, detachable shoulder strap, and key pouch incorporate classic calfskin elements.
Size: 23.5 x 17.5 x 11.5 cm

items.name_cn:

items.name_cn:
【LV X TM SPEEDY BANDOULIÈRE 25 Handbag】 M13085
This Speedy Bandoulière 25 SjGx handbag features a classic Monogram pattern rendered in bright colors by Japanese artist Takashi Murakami, showcasing the dynamic charm of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series together with the bow-shaped key pouch. Calfskin creates the Toron handle and a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, while the dazzling lock and corners draw inspiration from the brand's luggage elements.
Size: 25 x 19 x 15 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot M14017 Monogram】 The Louis Vuitton Noé Cargo bucket bag is constructed with Monogram canvas and features vintage leather trim, inheriting the Noé bucket bag designed in 1932 to carry champagne bottles. The wide front pocket and exquisite details pay homage to Louis Vuitton's long history while meeting modern needs. The top handle and shoulder strap are both detachable for flexible portability. 24 x 16 x 22 cm (Height x Width x Length)

The interior space and zip pocket make it convenient to hold daily essentials, and the sliding-chain shoulder strap offers versatile carrying options.
